guard_slots.template: CACHE_UNEXPIRED := filterCacheTTLGreaterEqual(CACHE, 0.0) /\ NXDOMAIN_CACHE_UNEXPIRED := filterNxdomainCacheTTLGreaterEqual(NXDOMAIN_CACHE, 0.0) /\ NODATA_CACHE_UNEXPIRED := filterNodataCacheTTLGreaterEqual(NODATA_CACHE, 0.0) /\ SNAME_FULL := initSNAME(QNAME, QTYPE, filterCacheCred(CACHE_UNEXPIRED, rsvMinCacheCredClient), nil) /\ ANS_CHAIN := initAnsChain(QNAME, QTYPE, filterCacheCred(CACHE_UNEXPIRED, rsvMinCacheCredClient), nil) /\ CACHE_TMP := if rtype(head(ANS_CHAIN)) == dname and match(QTYPE, cname) then updateCacheCred(CACHE_UNEXPIRED, dnameSynthesis(QNAME, head(ANS_CHAIN)), rsvMinCacheCredClient, 0.0) else CACHE_UNEXPIRED fi /\ RESP := responseFromCache(ID, SNAME_FULL, QTYPE, ANS_CHAIN, CACHE_TMP, NXDOMAIN_CACHE_UNEXPIRED, NODATA_CACHE_UNEXPIRED, rsvMinCacheCredClient, QNAME ) /\ rcode(RESP) =/= cacheMissRcode

CACHE_UNEXPIRED := filterCacheTTLGreaterEqual(CACHE, 0.0) /\ NXDOMAIN_CACHE_UNEXPIRED := filterNxdomainCacheTTLGreaterEqual(NXDOMAIN_CACHE, 0.0) /\ NODATA_CACHE_UNEXPIRED := filterNodataCacheTTLGreaterEqual(NODATA_CACHE, 0.0) /\ SNAME_FULL := initSNAME(QNAME, QTYPE, filterCacheCred(CACHE_UNEXPIRED, rsvMinCacheCredClient), nil) /\ ANS_CHAIN := initAnsChain(QNAME, QTYPE, filterCacheCred(CACHE_UNEXPIRED, rsvMinCacheCredClient), nil) /\ CACHE_TMP := if rtype(head(ANS_CHAIN)) == dname and match(QTYPE, cname) then updateCacheCred(CACHE_UNEXPIRED, dnameSynthesis(QNAME, head(ANS_CHAIN)), rsvMinCacheCredClient, 0.0) else CACHE_UNEXPIRED fi /\ RESP := responseFromCache(ID, SNAME_FULL, QTYPE, ANS_CHAIN, CACHE_TMP, NXDOMAIN_CACHE_UNEXPIRED, NODATA_CACHE_UNEXPIRED, rsvMinCacheCredClient, QNAME ) /\ rcode(RESP) == cacheMissRcode /\ < NAME NA > := initSLIST(SNAME_FULL, CACHE_UNEXPIRED, NXDOMAIN_CACHE_UNEXPIRED, NODATA_CACHE_UNEXPIRED, SBELT, QNAME) /\ QMIN_SNAME := initQMinSNAME(NAME, qminState(SNAME_FULL, maxMinimiseCount, minimiseOneLab, false), NODATA_CACHE_UNEXPIRED, NAME) /\ QMIN_STATE := initQMinState(NAME, qminState(SNAME_FULL, maxMinimiseCount, minimiseOneLab, false), NODATA_CACHE_UNEXPIRED, NAME) /\ QSTATE := queryState(query(ID, QNAME, QTYPE), CL, QMIN_SNAME, ID .. init, QMIN_STATE, ANS_CHAIN, < NAME NA >) /\ QSS'' := addResolverSubqueries(QSTATE, RSV, CACHE_UNEXPIRED, NXDOMAIN_CACHE_UNEXPIRED, NODATA_CACHE_UNEXPIRED, SBELT) ;; QSS /\ pairQSS(QSS_KNOWN_ADDR, QSS_UNKNOWN_ADDR) := splitQSSKnownAddr(QSS'') /\ IN' := (idNatEntry(ID, configWorkBudget), IN) /\ tupleQSSQSSIdNatMap(QSS_SEND, QSS_ABORT, IN'') := splitQSSWorkBudget(QSS_KNOWN_ADDR, IN') /\ QSS_FAILED := filterQSSClientQueriesToAbort((QSS_UNKNOWN_ADDR ;; QSS_ABORT), QSS_ABORT)

hasFollowUpQueryInQSSForId(ID, QSS ;; QSS') then IN else removeFromIdNatMap(ID, IN) fi, blockedQueries: QSS, sentQueries: QSS', STATE > (to ADDR from RSV : convertTTLAbsToRelResponse(RESP, 0.0)) if queryState(query(ID, QNAME, QTYPE), ADDR, SNAME, ID', qminState(SNAME_FULL, N, N', B), ANS', SLIST) := QSTATE /\ ADDR =/= RSV /\ B or (SNAME == SNAME_FULL and (qminQTYPE == QTYPE or (rtype(head(ANS)) == cname and match(QTYPE, cname))) ) or RCODE == 3 /\ rtype(head(ANS)) =/= cname or match(QTYPE, cname) /\ ANS == nil or ownerName(head(ANS)) == SNAME /\ CACHE_TMP := updateCacheAuthAns(nilCache, ANS, 0.0) /\ NXDOMAIN_CACHE_TMP := updateNxdomainCache(nilNxdomainCache, SNAME, ANS, AUTH, RCODE, 0.0) /\ NODATA_CACHE_TMP := updateNodataCache(nilNodataCache, SNAME, QTYPE, ANS, AUTH, RCODE, 0.0) /\ RESP := responseFromCache(ID, SNAME, QTYPE, ANS', CACHE_TMP, NXDOMAIN_CACHE_TMP, NODATA_CACHE_TMP, rsvMinCacheCredClient, QNAME ) /\ rcode(RESP) =/= cacheMissRcode /\ CACHE_UNEXPIRED := filterCacheTTLGreaterEqual(CACHE, 0.0) /\ NXDOMAIN_CACHE_UNEXPIRED := filterNxdomainCacheTTLGreaterEqual(NXDOMAIN_CACHE, 0.0) /\ NODATA_CACHE_UNEXPIRED := filterNodataCacheTTLGreaterEqual(NODATA_CACHE, 0.0) /\ CACHE' := updateCacheAuthAns(CACHE_UNEXPIRED, ANS, 0.0) /\ CACHE'' := updateCacheCred(CACHE', AUTH ADD, 1, 0.0) /\ NXDOMAIN_CACHE' := updateNxdomainCache(NXDOMAIN_CACHE_UNEXPIRED, SNAME, ANS, AUTH, RCODE, 0.0) /\ NODATA_CACHE' := updateNodataCache(NODATA_CACHE_UNEXPIRED, SNAME, QTYPE, ANS, AUTH, RCODE, 0.0)

queryState(query(ID, QNAME, QTYPE), RSV, SNAME, ID', qminState(SNAME_FULL, N, N', B), ANS', SLIST) := QSTATE /\ B or (SNAME == SNAME_FULL and qminQTYPE == QTYPE) or RCODE == 3 /\ rtype(head(ANS)) =/= cname or match(QTYPE, cname) /\ ANS == nil or ownerName(head(ANS)) == SNAME /\ CACHE_TMP := updateCacheAuthAns(nilCache, ANS, 0.0) /\ NXDOMAIN_CACHE_TMP := updateNxdomainCache(nilNxdomainCache, SNAME, ANS, AUTH, RCODE, 0.0) /\ NODATA_CACHE_TMP := updateNodataCache(nilNodataCache, SNAME, QTYPE, ANS, AUTH, RCODE, 0.0) /\ RESP := responseFromCache(ID, SNAME, QTYPE, ANS', CACHE_TMP, NXDOMAIN_CACHE_TMP, NODATA_CACHE_TMP, rsvMinCacheCredResolver, QNAME ) /\ rcode(RESP) =/= cacheMissRcode /\ CACHE_UNEXPIRED := filterCacheTTLGreaterEqual(CACHE, 0.0) /\ NXDOMAIN_CACHE_UNEXPIRED := filterNxdomainCacheTTLGreaterEqual(NXDOMAIN_CACHE, 0.0) /\ NODATA_CACHE_UNEXPIRED := filterNodataCacheTTLGreaterEqual(NODATA_CACHE, 0.0) /\ CACHE' := updateCacheAuthAns(CACHE_UNEXPIRED, ANS, 0.0) /\ CACHE'' := updateCacheCred(CACHE', AUTH ADD, 1, 0.0) /\ NXDOMAIN_CACHE' := updateNxdomainCache(NXDOMAIN_CACHE_UNEXPIRED, SNAME, ANS, AUTH, RCODE, 0.0) /\ NODATA_CACHE' := updateNodataCache(NODATA_CACHE_UNEXPIRED, SNAME, QTYPE, ANS, AUTH, RCODE, 0.0) /\ pairQSS(QSS'', QSS''') := updateSLISTsOfQSSs(QSS, QSS', RESP) /\ pairQSS(QSS_EMPTY, QSS_NONEMPTY) := splitQSSEmpty(QSS'') /\ pairQSS(QSS_KNOWN_ADDR, QSS_UNKNOWN_ADDR) := splitQSSKnownAddr(QSS_NONEMPTY) /\ tupleQSSQSSIdNatMap(QSS_SEND, QSS_ABORT, IN') := splitQSSWorkBudget(QSS_KNOWN_ADDR, IN) /\ QSS_FAILED := filterQSSClientQueriesToAbort(QSS_EMPTY, QSS_EMPTY) ;; filterQSSClientQueriesToAbort((QSS_UNKNOWN_ADDR ;; QSS_ABORT), QSS_ABORT)

hasFollowUpQueryInQSSForId(ID, QSS ;; QSS') then IN else removeFromIdNatMap(ID, IN) fi, blockedQueries: QSS, sentQueries: QSS', STATE > (to ADDR from RSV : convertTTLAbsToRelResponse(RESP, 0.0)) if queryState(query(ID, QNAME, QTYPE), ADDR, SNAME, ID', qminState(SNAME_FULL, N, N', B), ANS', SLIST) := QSTATE /\ ADDR =/= RSV /\ B or SNAME == SNAME_FULL /\ not(match(QTYPE, cname)) /\ < SNAME, cname, TTL, NAME' > RS := ANS /\ CACHE_UNEXPIRED := filterCacheTTLGreaterEqual(CACHE, 0.0) /\ NXDOMAIN_CACHE_UNEXPIRED := filterNxdomainCacheTTLGreaterEqual(NXDOMAIN_CACHE, 0.0) /\ NODATA_CACHE_UNEXPIRED := filterNodataCacheTTLGreaterEqual(NODATA_CACHE, 0.0) /\ CACHE' := updateCacheAuthAns(CACHE_UNEXPIRED, ANS, 0.0) /\ CACHE'' := updateCacheCred(CACHE', AUTH ADD, 1, 0.0) /\ NXDOMAIN_CACHE' := updateNxdomainCache(NXDOMAIN_CACHE_UNEXPIRED, SNAME, ANS, AUTH, RCODE, 0.0) /\ NODATA_CACHE' := updateNodataCache(NODATA_CACHE_UNEXPIRED, SNAME, if B then QTYPE else qminQTYPE fi, ANS, AUTH, RCODE, 0.0) /\ SNAME_FULL' := initSNAME(NAME', QTYPE, filterCacheCred(CACHE'', rsvMinCacheCredClient), ANS' head(ANS)) /\ ANS_CHAIN := initAnsChain(NAME', QTYPE, filterCacheCred(CACHE'', rsvMinCacheCredClient), ANS' head(ANS)) /\ RESP := responseFromCache(ID, SNAME_FULL', QTYPE, ANS_CHAIN, CACHE'', NXDOMAIN_CACHE', NODATA_CACHE', rsvMinCacheCredClient, QNAME ) /\ rcode(RESP) =/= cacheMissRcode

queryState(query(ID, QNAME, QTYPE), RSV, SNAME, ID', qminState(SNAME_FULL, N, N', B), ANS', SLIST) := QSTATE /\ B or SNAME == SNAME_FULL /\ not(match(QTYPE, cname)) /\ < SNAME, cname, TTL, NAME' > RS := ANS /\ CACHE_UNEXPIRED := filterCacheTTLGreaterEqual(CACHE, 0.0) /\ NXDOMAIN_CACHE_UNEXPIRED := filterNxdomainCacheTTLGreaterEqual(NXDOMAIN_CACHE, 0.0) /\ NODATA_CACHE_UNEXPIRED := filterNodataCacheTTLGreaterEqual(NODATA_CACHE, 0.0) /\ CACHE' := updateCacheAuthAns(CACHE_UNEXPIRED, ANS, 0.0) /\ CACHE'' := updateCacheCred(CACHE', AUTH ADD, 1, 0.0) /\ NXDOMAIN_CACHE' := updateNxdomainCache(NXDOMAIN_CACHE_UNEXPIRED, SNAME, ANS, AUTH, RCODE, 0.0) /\ NODATA_CACHE' := updateNodataCache(NODATA_CACHE_UNEXPIRED, SNAME, if B then QTYPE else qminQTYPE fi, ANS, AUTH, RCODE, 0.0) /\ SNAME_FULL' := initSNAME(NAME', QTYPE, filterCacheCred(CACHE'', rsvMinCacheCredResolver), ANS' head(ANS)) /\ ANS_CHAIN := initAnsChain(NAME', QTYPE, filterCacheCred(CACHE'', rsvMinCacheCredResolver), ANS' head(ANS)) /\ RESP := responseFromCache(ID, SNAME_FULL', QTYPE, ANS_CHAIN, CACHE'', NXDOMAIN_CACHE', NODATA_CACHE', rsvMinCacheCredResolver, QNAME ) /\ rcode(RESP) =/= cacheMissRcode /\ pairQSS(QSS'', QSS''') := updateSLISTsOfQSSs(QSS, QSS', RESP) /\ pairQSS(QSS_EMPTY, QSS_NONEMPTY) := splitQSSEmpty(QSS'') /\ pairQSS(QSS_KNOWN_ADDR, QSS_UNKNOWN_ADDR) := splitQSSKnownAddr(QSS_NONEMPTY) /\ tupleQSSQSSIdNatMap(QSS_SEND, QSS_ABORT, IN') := splitQSSWorkBudget(QSS_KNOWN_ADDR, IN) /\ QSS_FAILED := filterQSSClientQueriesToAbort(QSS_EMPTY, QSS_EMPTY) ;; filterQSSClientQueriesToAbort((QSS_UNKNOWN_ADDR ;; QSS_ABORT), QSS_ABORT)

queryState(query(ID, QNAME, QTYPE), ADDR, SNAME, ID', qminState(SNAME_FULL, N, N', B), ANS', SLIST) := QSTATE /\ B or SNAME == SNAME_FULL /\ not(match(QTYPE, cname)) /\ < SNAME, cname, TTL, NAME' > RS := ANS /\ CACHE_UNEXPIRED := filterCacheTTLGreaterEqual(CACHE, 0.0) /\ NXDOMAIN_CACHE_UNEXPIRED := filterNxdomainCacheTTLGreaterEqual(NXDOMAIN_CACHE, 0.0) /\ NODATA_CACHE_UNEXPIRED := filterNodataCacheTTLGreaterEqual(NODATA_CACHE, 0.0) /\ CACHE' := updateCacheAuthAns(CACHE_UNEXPIRED, ANS, 0.0) /\ CACHE'' := updateCacheCred(CACHE', AUTH ADD, 1, 0.0) /\ NXDOMAIN_CACHE' := updateNxdomainCache(NXDOMAIN_CACHE_UNEXPIRED, SNAME, ANS, AUTH, RCODE, 0.0) /\ NODATA_CACHE' := updateNodataCache(NODATA_CACHE_UNEXPIRED, SNAME, if B then QTYPE else qminQTYPE fi, ANS, AUTH, RCODE, 0.0) /\ SNAME_FULL' := initSNAME(NAME', QTYPE, filterCacheCred(CACHE'', if ADDR == RSV then rsvMinCacheCredResolver else rsvMinCacheCredClient fi), ANS' head(ANS)) /\ ANS_CHAIN := initAnsChain(NAME', QTYPE, filterCacheCred(CACHE'', if ADDR == RSV then rsvMinCacheCredResolver else rsvMinCacheCredClient fi), ANS' head(ANS)) /\ RESP := responseFromCache(ID, SNAME_FULL', QTYPE, ANS_CHAIN, CACHE'', NXDOMAIN_CACHE', NODATA_CACHE', if ADDR == RSV then rsvMinCacheCredResolver else rsvMinCacheCredClient fi, QNAME ) /\ rcode(RESP) == cacheMissRcode /\ < NAME NA > := initSLIST(SNAME_FULL', CACHE'', NXDOMAIN_CACHE', NODATA_CACHE', SBELT, QNAME) /\ QMIN_SNAME := initQMinSNAME(NAME, qminState(SNAME_FULL', maxMinimiseCount, minimiseOneLab, false), NODATA_CACHE', NAME) /\ QMIN_STATE := initQMinState(NAME, qminState(SNAME_FULL', maxMinimiseCount, minimiseOneLab, false), NODATA_CACHE', NAME) /\ QSTATE' := queryState(query(ID, QNAME, QTYPE), ADDR, QMIN_SNAME, ID' .. cn, QMIN_STATE, ANS_CHAIN, < NAME NA >) /\ QSS'' := addResolverSubqueries(QSTATE', RSV, CACHE'', NXDOMAIN_CACHE', NODATA_CACHE', SBELT) ;; QSS /\ pairQSS(QSS_KNOWN_ADDR, QSS_UNKNOWN_ADDR) := splitQSSKnownAddr(QSS'') /\ tupleQSSQSSIdNatMap(QSS_SEND, QSS_ABORT, IN') := splitQSSWorkBudget(QSS_KNOWN_ADDR, IN) /\ QSS_FAILED := filterQSSClientQueriesToAbort((QSS_UNKNOWN_ADDR ;; QSS_ABORT), QSS_ABORT)

hasFollowUpQueryInQSSForId(ID, QSS ;; QSS') then IN else removeFromIdNatMap(ID, IN) fi, blockedQueries: QSS, sentQueries: QSS', STATE > (to ADDR from RSV : convertTTLAbsToRelResponse(RESP, 0.0)) if queryState(query(ID, QNAME, QTYPE), ADDR, SNAME, ID', qminState(SNAME_FULL, N, N', B), ANS', SLIST) := QSTATE /\ ADDR =/= RSV /\ R RS := ANS /\ < NAME'', dname, TTL, NAME''' > := R /\ NAME'' =/= SNAME /\ RS' := if RS == nil then nil else tail(RS) fi /\ < SNAME_FULL, cname, TTL, NAME' > := dnameSynthesis(SNAME_FULL, R) /\ CACHE_UNEXPIRED := filterCacheTTLGreaterEqual(CACHE, 0.0) /\ NXDOMAIN_CACHE_UNEXPIRED := filterNxdomainCacheTTLGreaterEqual(NXDOMAIN_CACHE, 0.0) /\ NODATA_CACHE_UNEXPIRED := filterNodataCacheTTLGreaterEqual(NODATA_CACHE, 0.0) /\ CACHE' := updateCacheAuthAns(CACHE_UNEXPIRED, R < SNAME_FULL, cname, TTL, NAME' > RS', 0.0) /\ CACHE'' := updateCacheCred(CACHE', AUTH ADD, 1, 0.0) /\ NXDOMAIN_CACHE' := updateNxdomainCache(NXDOMAIN_CACHE_UNEXPIRED, SNAME, ANS, AUTH, RCODE, 0.0) /\ NODATA_CACHE' := updateNodataCache(NODATA_CACHE_UNEXPIRED, SNAME, if B then QTYPE else qminQTYPE fi, ANS, AUTH, RCODE, 0.0) /\ SNAME_FULL' := if match(QTYPE, cname) then SNAME_FULL else initSNAME(NAME', QTYPE, filterCacheCred(CACHE'', rsvMinCacheCredClient), ANS' R < SNAME_FULL, cname, TTL, NAME' >) fi /\ ANS_CHAIN := if match(QTYPE, cname) then ANS' R else initAnsChain(NAME', QTYPE, filterCacheCred(CACHE'', rsvMinCacheCredClient), ANS' R < SNAME_FULL, cname, TTL, NAME' >) fi /\ RESP := responseFromCache(ID, SNAME_FULL', QTYPE, ANS_CHAIN, CACHE'', NXDOMAIN_CACHE', NODATA_CACHE', rsvMinCacheCredClient, QNAME ) /\ rcode(RESP) =/= cacheMissRcode

queryState(query(ID, QNAME, QTYPE), RSV, SNAME, ID', qminState(SNAME_FULL, N, N', B), ANS', SLIST) := QSTATE /\ R RS := ANS /\ < NAME'', dname, TTL, NAME''' > := R /\ NAME'' =/= SNAME /\ RS' := if RS == nil then nil else tail(RS) fi /\ < SNAME_FULL, cname, TTL, NAME' > := dnameSynthesis(SNAME_FULL, R) /\ CACHE_UNEXPIRED := filterCacheTTLGreaterEqual(CACHE, 0.0) /\ NXDOMAIN_CACHE_UNEXPIRED := filterNxdomainCacheTTLGreaterEqual(NXDOMAIN_CACHE, 0.0) /\ NODATA_CACHE_UNEXPIRED := filterNodataCacheTTLGreaterEqual(NODATA_CACHE, 0.0) /\ CACHE' := updateCacheAuthAns(CACHE_UNEXPIRED, R < SNAME_FULL, cname, TTL, NAME' > RS', 0.0) /\ CACHE'' := updateCacheCred(CACHE', AUTH ADD, 1, 0.0) /\ NXDOMAIN_CACHE' := updateNxdomainCache(NXDOMAIN_CACHE_UNEXPIRED, SNAME, ANS, AUTH, RCODE, 0.0) /\ NODATA_CACHE' := updateNodataCache(NODATA_CACHE_UNEXPIRED, SNAME, if B then QTYPE else qminQTYPE fi, ANS, AUTH, RCODE, 0.0) /\ SNAME_FULL' := initSNAME(NAME', QTYPE, filterCacheCred(CACHE'', rsvMinCacheCredResolver), ANS' R < SNAME_FULL, cname, TTL, NAME' >) /\ ANS_CHAIN := initAnsChain(NAME', QTYPE, filterCacheCred(CACHE'', rsvMinCacheCredResolver), ANS' R < SNAME_FULL, cname, TTL, NAME' >) /\ RESP := responseFromCache(ID, SNAME_FULL', QTYPE, ANS_CHAIN, CACHE'', NXDOMAIN_CACHE', NODATA_CACHE', rsvMinCacheCredResolver, QNAME ) /\ rcode(RESP) =/= cacheMissRcode /\ pairQSS(QSS'', QSS''') := updateSLISTsOfQSSs(QSS, QSS', RESP) /\ pairQSS(QSS_EMPTY, QSS_NONEMPTY) := splitQSSEmpty(QSS'') /\ pairQSS(QSS_KNOWN_ADDR, QSS_UNKNOWN_ADDR) := splitQSSKnownAddr(QSS_NONEMPTY) /\ tupleQSSQSSIdNatMap(QSS_SEND, QSS_ABORT, IN') := splitQSSWorkBudget(QSS_KNOWN_ADDR, IN) /\ QSS_FAILED := filterQSSClientQueriesToAbort(QSS_EMPTY, QSS_EMPTY) ;; filterQSSClientQueriesToAbort((QSS_UNKNOWN_ADDR ;; QSS_ABORT), QSS_ABORT)

queryState(query(ID, QNAME, QTYPE), ADDR, SNAME, ID', qminState(SNAME_FULL, N, N', B), ANS', SLIST) := QSTATE /\ R RS := ANS /\ < NAME'', dname, TTL, NAME''' > := R /\ NAME'' =/= SNAME /\ RS' := if RS == nil then nil else tail(RS) fi /\ < SNAME_FULL, cname, TTL, NAME' > := dnameSynthesis(SNAME_FULL, R) /\ CACHE_UNEXPIRED := filterCacheTTLGreaterEqual(CACHE, 0.0) /\ NXDOMAIN_CACHE_UNEXPIRED := filterNxdomainCacheTTLGreaterEqual(NXDOMAIN_CACHE, 0.0) /\ NODATA_CACHE_UNEXPIRED := filterNodataCacheTTLGreaterEqual(NODATA_CACHE, 0.0) /\ CACHE' := updateCacheAuthAns(CACHE_UNEXPIRED, R < SNAME_FULL, cname, TTL, NAME' > RS', 0.0) /\ CACHE'' := updateCacheCred(CACHE', AUTH ADD, 1, 0.0) /\ NXDOMAIN_CACHE' := updateNxdomainCache(NXDOMAIN_CACHE_UNEXPIRED, SNAME, ANS, AUTH, RCODE, 0.0) /\ NODATA_CACHE' := updateNodataCache(NODATA_CACHE_UNEXPIRED, SNAME, if B then QTYPE else qminQTYPE fi, ANS, AUTH, RCODE, 0.0) /\ SNAME_FULL' := if match(QTYPE, cname) then SNAME_FULL else initSNAME(NAME', QTYPE, filterCacheCred(CACHE'', if ADDR == RSV then rsvMinCacheCredResolver else rsvMinCacheCredClient fi), ANS' R < SNAME_FULL, cname, TTL, NAME' >) fi /\ ANS_CHAIN := if match(QTYPE, cname) then ANS' R else initAnsChain(NAME', QTYPE, filterCacheCred(CACHE'', if ADDR == RSV then rsvMinCacheCredResolver else rsvMinCacheCredClient fi), ANS' R < SNAME_FULL, cname, TTL, NAME' >) fi /\ RESP := responseFromCache(ID, SNAME_FULL', QTYPE, ANS_CHAIN, CACHE'', NXDOMAIN_CACHE', NODATA_CACHE', if ADDR == RSV then rsvMinCacheCredResolver else rsvMinCacheCredClient fi, QNAME ) /\ rcode(RESP) == cacheMissRcode /\ < NAME NA > := initSLIST(SNAME_FULL', CACHE'', NXDOMAIN_CACHE', NODATA_CACHE', SBELT, QNAME) /\ QMIN_SNAME := initQMinSNAME(NAME, qminState(SNAME_FULL', maxMinimiseCount, minimiseOneLab, false), NODATA_CACHE', NAME) /\ QMIN_STATE := initQMinState(NAME, qminState(SNAME_FULL', maxMinimiseCount, minimiseOneLab, false), NODATA_CACHE', NAME) /\ QSTATE' := queryState(query(ID, QNAME, QTYPE), ADDR, QMIN_SNAME, ID' .. cn, QMIN_STATE, ANS_CHAIN, < NAME NA >) /\ QSS'' := addResolverSubqueries(QSTATE', RSV, CACHE'', NXDOMAIN_CACHE', NODATA_CACHE', SBELT) ;; QSS /\ pairQSS(QSS_KNOWN_ADDR, QSS_UNKNOWN_ADDR) := splitQSSKnownAddr(QSS'') /\ tupleQSSQSSIdNatMap(QSS_SEND, QSS_ABORT, IN') := splitQSSWorkBudget(QSS_KNOWN_ADDR, IN) /\ QSS_FAILED := filterQSSClientQueriesToAbort((QSS_UNKNOWN_ADDR ;; QSS_ABORT), QSS_ABORT)

filterRType(ns, AUTH) =/= nil /\ queryState(query(ID, QNAME, QTYPE), ADDR, SNAME, ID', qminState(SNAME_FULL, N, N', B), ANS', < NAME NA >) := QSTATE /\ delegationIsBetter(SNAME_FULL, AUTH, NAME) /\ CACHE_UNEXPIRED := filterCacheTTLGreaterEqual(CACHE, 0.0) /\ NXDOMAIN_CACHE_UNEXPIRED := filterNxdomainCacheTTLGreaterEqual(NXDOMAIN_CACHE, 0.0) /\ NODATA_CACHE_UNEXPIRED := filterNodataCacheTTLGreaterEqual(NODATA_CACHE, 0.0) /\ CACHE' := updateCacheCred(CACHE_UNEXPIRED, AUTH ADD, 1, 0.0) /\ < NAME' NA' > := initSLIST(SNAME_FULL, CACHE', NXDOMAIN_CACHE_UNEXPIRED, NODATA_CACHE_UNEXPIRED, SBELT, QNAME) /\ QMIN_SNAME := initQMinSNAME(NAME', qminState(SNAME_FULL, N, N', B), NODATA_CACHE_UNEXPIRED, NAME') /\ QMIN_STATE := initQMinState(NAME', qminState(SNAME_FULL, N, N', B), NODATA_CACHE_UNEXPIRED, NAME') /\ QSTATE' := queryState(query(ID, QNAME, QTYPE), ADDR, QMIN_SNAME, ID' .. ref, QMIN_STATE, ANS', < NAME' NA' >) /\ QSS'' := addResolverSubqueries(QSTATE', RSV, CACHE', NXDOMAIN_CACHE_UNEXPIRED, NODATA_CACHE_UNEXPIRED, SBELT) ;; QSS /\ pairQSS(QSS_KNOWN_ADDR, QSS_UNKNOWN_ADDR) := splitQSSKnownAddr(QSS'') /\ tupleQSSQSSIdNatMap(QSS_SEND, QSS_ABORT, IN') := splitQSSWorkBudget(QSS_KNOWN_ADDR, IN) /\ QSS_FAILED := filterQSSClientQueriesToAbort((QSS_UNKNOWN_ADDR ;; QSS_ABORT), QSS_ABORT)

rtype(head(ANS)) =/= dname or ownerName(head(ANS)) == SNAME /\ RCODE == 0 or (RCODE == 3 and rtype(head(ANS)) == cname) /\ ANS =/= nil or filterRType(ns, AUTH) == nil /\ queryState(query(ID, QNAME, QTYPE), ADDR, SNAME, ID', qminState(SNAME_FULL, N, N', false), ANS', < NAME NA >) := QSTATE /\ SNAME =/= SNAME_FULL or (qminQTYPE =/= QTYPE and rtype(head(ANS)) =/= cname) /\ CACHE_UNEXPIRED := filterCacheTTLGreaterEqual(CACHE, 0.0) /\ NXDOMAIN_CACHE_UNEXPIRED := filterNxdomainCacheTTLGreaterEqual(NXDOMAIN_CACHE, 0.0) /\ NODATA_CACHE_UNEXPIRED := filterNodataCacheTTLGreaterEqual(NODATA_CACHE, 0.0) /\ CACHE' := updateCacheAuthAns(CACHE_UNEXPIRED, ANS, 0.0) /\ CACHE'' := updateCacheCred(CACHE', AUTH ADD, 1, 0.0) /\ NXDOMAIN_CACHE' := updateNxdomainCache(NXDOMAIN_CACHE_UNEXPIRED, SNAME, ANS, AUTH, RCODE, 0.0) /\ NODATA_CACHE' := updateNodataCache(NODATA_CACHE_UNEXPIRED, SNAME, qminQTYPE, ANS, AUTH, RCODE, 0.0) /\ QMIN_SNAME := initQMinSNAME(SNAME, qminState(SNAME_FULL, N, N', false), NODATA_CACHE', NAME) /\ QMIN_STATE := initQMinState(SNAME, qminState(SNAME_FULL, N, N', false), NODATA_CACHE', NAME) /\ QSTATE' := queryState(query(ID, QNAME, QTYPE), ADDR, QMIN_SNAME, ID' .. qm, QMIN_STATE, ANS', < NAME NA >) /\ tupleQSSQSSIdNatMap(QSS_SEND, QSS_ABORT, IN') := splitQSSWorkBudget(QSTATE', IN) /\ QSS_FAILED := filterQSSClientQueriesToAbort((QSS ;; QSS_ABORT), QSS_ABORT)

filterRType(ns, AUTH) =/= nil /\ queryState(query(ID, QNAME, QTYPE), ADDR, SNAME, ID', qminState(SNAME_FULL, N, N', B), ANS', < NAME NA >) := QSTATE /\ not(delegationIsBetter(SNAME_FULL, AUTH, NAME)) /\ ADDR =/= RSV /\ NA' := removeNamesFromSLISTMap(NA, namesForAddressSLIST(NA, NS)) /\ NA'' := removeNamesWithoutSubqueriesFromSLISTMap(NA', QSS ;; QSS', ID) /\ QSTATE' := queryState(query(ID, QNAME, QTYPE), ADDR, SNAME, ID' .. nxt, qminState(SNAME_FULL, N, N', B), ANS', < NAME NA'' >) /\ pairQSS(QSS_EMPTY, QSS_NONEMPTY) := splitQSSEmpty(QSTATE') /\ pairQSS(QSS_KNOWN_ADDR, QSS_UNKNOWN_ADDR) := splitQSSKnownAddr(QSS_NONEMPTY) /\ tupleQSSQSSIdNatMap(QSS_SEND, QSS_ABORT, IN') := splitQSSWorkBudget(QSS_KNOWN_ADDR, IN) /\ QSS_FAILED := QSS_ABORT ;; QSS_EMPTY

filterRType(ns, AUTH) =/= nil /\ queryState(query(ID, QNAME, QTYPE), RSV, SNAME, ID', qminState(SNAME_FULL, N, N', B), ANS', < NAME NA >) := QSTATE /\ not(delegationIsBetter(SNAME_FULL, AUTH, NAME)) /\ NA' := removeNamesFromSLISTMap(NA, namesForAddressSLIST(NA, NS)) /\ NA'' := removeNamesWithoutSubqueriesFromSLISTMap(NA', QSS ;; QSS', ID) /\ QSTATE' := queryState(query(ID, QNAME, QTYPE), RSV, SNAME, ID' .. nxt, qminState(SNAME_FULL, N, N', B), ANS', < NAME NA'' >) /\ QSS'' := if NA'' == empty then removeNameFromSLISTsOfQSSIfNullAddr(QSS, QNAME) else QSS fi /\ QSS''' := if NA'' == empty then removeNameFromSLISTsOfQSSIfNullAddr(QSS', QNAME) else QSS' fi /\ pairQSS(QSS_EMPTY, QSS_NONEMPTY) := splitQSSEmpty(QSTATE' ;; QSS'') /\ pairQSS(QSS_KNOWN_ADDR, QSS_UNKNOWN_ADDR) := splitQSSKnownAddr(QSS_NONEMPTY) /\ tupleQSSQSSIdNatMap(QSS_SEND, QSS_ABORT, IN') := splitQSSWorkBudget(QSS_KNOWN_ADDR, IN) /\ QSS_FAILED := filterQSSClientQueriesToAbort(QSS_EMPTY, QSS_EMPTY) ;; filterQSSClientQueriesToAbort((QSS_UNKNOWN_ADDR ;; QSS_ABORT), QSS_ABORT)

queryState(query(ID, QNAME, QTYPE), ADDR, SNAME, ID', qminState(SNAME_FULL, N, N', B), ANS', < NAME NA >) := QSTATE /\ ADDR =/= RSV /\ NA' := removeNamesFromSLISTMap(NA, namesForAddressSLIST(NA, NS)) /\ NA'' := removeNamesWithoutSubqueriesFromSLISTMap(NA', QSS ;; QSS', ID) /\ QSTATE' := queryState(query(ID, QNAME, QTYPE), ADDR, SNAME, ID' .. nxt, qminState(SNAME_FULL, N, N', B), ANS', < NAME NA'' >) /\ pairQSS(QSS_EMPTY, QSS_NONEMPTY) := splitQSSEmpty(QSTATE') /\ pairQSS(QSS_KNOWN_ADDR, QSS_UNKNOWN_ADDR) := splitQSSKnownAddr(QSS_NONEMPTY) /\ tupleQSSQSSIdNatMap(QSS_SEND, QSS_ABORT, IN') := splitQSSWorkBudget(QSS_KNOWN_ADDR, IN) /\ QSS_FAILED := QSS_ABORT ;; QSS_EMPTY
